overall.description: Static shot of a dimly lit Gothic great hall interior from a video game, featuring high vaulted ceilings, tall arched windows with circular tracery, stone columns, and figures seated at round tables. The scene maintains a consistent atmospheric perspective with cool stone tones and warm accent lighting from wall sconces.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a Gothic great hall interior from a video game, showcasing tall arched windows, massive stone columns, and round dining tables. The scene is dimly lit with cool stone tones contrasted by warm wall lighting. NPCs remain seated at tables in the background, and the camera holds a steady position throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a dimly lit Gothic great hall that emphasizes the scale and stillness of the interior. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, highlighting the contrast between the cool gray stone of the massive columns and the warm glow of wall sconces. As the eye lingers on the architecture, the scene reveals tall arched windows with intricate circular tracery that filter the ambient light. The perspective remains fixed, allowing the quiet presence of NPCs seated at round dining tables in the background to anchor the composition. Finally, the shot holds its position, preserving the somber and imposing mood of the vaulted hall.
